item.title: The secret life of SIM cards
item.description: Are you a privacy obsessed? You can do everything in your power to avoid being tracked through your phone, such as change OS, avoid Google‘s services, only use open-source apps from F-Droid, turn off WiFi and location services but…there is one thing that is majorly overlooked. Your SIM card’s has ability to track you # It has a unique ID that is likely tied to your identity. It authenticates you to cell towers wherever you go: this means that your provider has access to your location at all times through triangulation:
